# Spec Template

Use this when a new product area or substantial feature needs to become repo
knowledge before implementation.

## Problem

Describe the user problem or operational gap.

## Users

List the primary users, maintainers, or agents affected.

## Goals

- Goal 1
- Goal 2

## Non-Goals

- Non-goal 1
- Non-goal 2

## Product Contract

Describe the stable behavior that should remain true after implementation.

## Work Slices

| Slice | Story doc | Status |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Slice 1 | `docs/stories/...` | planned |

## Decisions Needed

- Decision 1

## Validation Expectations

List build, test, manual, browser, provider, or network proof.

## Source Material

Link screenshots, external docs, user notes, or prior repo docs.
